name: Content: Create Story

description.en: Create a vertical 9:16 story or reel for social media using AI.
description.de: Erstelle eine vertikale 9:16 Story oder ein Reel fuer Social Media mit KI.
description.fr: Creez une story verticale 9:16 ou un reel pour les reseaux sociaux avec l IA.
description.es: Crea una historia vertical 9:16 o reel para redes sociales usando IA.
description.ro: Creeaza o poveste verticala 9:16 sau un reel pentru retelele sociale folosind IA.

bot: Compose a Studio prompt from the topic. ALWAYS include 9:16 vertical format in the prompt for stories/reels. After project is created, call studio_produce then studio_export and share the link.

inputs.name: Topic

description.de: Worum geht es in der Story?

inputs.bot: Compose a Studio-ready prompt from the user's topic. ALWAYS include '9:16 vertical aspect ratio' in the prompt. Mention brand-kit styling and the target platform. Example: 'Create a 9:16 vertical Instagram Story about weekend specials with brand colors and logo'.

success.fr: Creation de ta story en cours...
